title: No more automatic smileys
excerpt:
In France (as well as in other countries), we write one space before and after a “:” 
The result in Monday is a smiley 
I can’t stand this behaviour anymore. 
You muste create an option to disable it

posts.author: Franck (Covens)
posts.cookedHtml:
In France (as well as in other countries), we write one space before and after a “:”

The result in Monday is a smiley

I can’t stand this behaviour anymore.

You muste create an option to disable it
